meta.title: DEF CON 31 - Top Tips for new DEF CON Attendees - video team
meta.description:
Silk asks attendees of DEF CON 31 for their best DEF CON tips.

Drink water.

Created by: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCbHYwhbarpO6vXgbIYmcXnQ
